nasb.text: Behold, the Lord will dispossess her And cast her wealth into the sea; And she will be consumed with fire.

esv.text: But behold, the Lord will strip her of her possessions and strike down her power on the sea, and she shall be devoured by fire.

cnv.text: 看哪！主必奪去她的一切， 摧毀她海上的勢力， 她必被火吞滅。

ccb.text: 然而，看啊，主必夺去她的一切， 摧毁她海上的权势， 使她被火吞噬。
